description: Deterministic retrieval corpus: entities, curated observations, wiki pages, and raw source documents (notes, meeting notes, contact metadata, architecture docs). Seeded into an in-memory SQLite store with the HashEmbedder, then queried through the real hybrid (vector + FTS) retrieval path in @meos/core. Expected hits are referenced by stable 'ref' keys so metric numbers are reproducible.

entities.name: Dana Okoye
entities.summary: Lead designer on the Orion project.

entities.name: Marco Bianchi
entities.summary: Backend engineer; owns the billing service.

observations.text: Dana Okoye relocated to the Berlin office in March.
Dana Okoye is the lead designer responsible for the Orion visual system.
Marco Bianchi owns the billing service and its payment reconciliation logic.
Orion is scheduled to launch to Acme Corp in Q3.
The billing service runs on Postgres and processes invoices nightly.
Acme Corp signed a three-year enterprise contract worth significant recurring revenue.

wikiPages.body: Dana Okoye is the lead designer driving the Orion redesign. She relocated to Berlin and owns the visual system.
The Billing Service is the internal payments and invoicing system, owned by Marco Bianchi, running on Postgres.

sources.title: Team onboarding notes
sources.content: New joiner notes. Dana Okoye relocated to the Berlin office in March. Marco Bianchi owns the billing service.

sources.title: Orion weekly sync
sources.content: Orion weekly. Dana presented the visual system. Launch to Acme Corp targeted for Q3. Action items captured.

sources.title: Architecture overview
sources.content: The billing service runs on Postgres and processes invoices nightly. Reconciliation is handled by a cron job.

sources.title: Acme Corp account
sources.content: Acme Corp is our primary enterprise customer. Signed a three-year enterprise contract. Main contact lives in Berlin.

queries.note: Entity is never named; must surface via content, not literal substring.
Should surface Marco and the billing project.

queries.query: when does Orion launch and to whom?
what is the Acme contract worth?
what processes invoices nightly on Postgres?
